body.text: No uploads ★ No cloud ★ No tracking ★ SHA-256 ★ Web Worker ★ WASM ★ Works offline ★

body.subheading: SHA-256 for files of any size, computed entirely in your browser. Your file never leaves your machine — there is no server to send it to. Don't believe us? Turn off your Wi-Fi and try.

features.title: Nothing gets uploaded
features.body: Your file is read straight from disk with the File API. Not a single byte of it goes over the network — open devtools and watch: zero requests.

features.title: Big files, flat memory
features.body: The file streams through a WASM hasher in 8 MB chunks, so memory stays flat whether it's 8 KB or 10 GB. Verified against shasum on a 10 GB file.

features.title: The page never freezes
features.body: Hashing runs in a Web Worker, off the main thread. Scroll, type, paste a checksum — the UI stays butter while the worker crunches.
